allowed_inputs: workstation command-center workplan and generated state artifacts
worldwide intake artifacts from Phases 3 through 8
claim_boundary: Forecast Phase 1 defines scope only. It does not claim prediction, alerts, production monitoring, causal inference, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
purpose: Define what the Forecast + Negative-Space Engine may read, what it may output, and what it must not claim.
scope_rules: Observed metadata may become a candidate only, not a conclusion.
Negative space means missing or underrepresented signal, not proof of absence or suppression.
Forecast candidate means review-worthy possibility, not prediction.
Every real-world suggestion must preserve human-review control.
All public-facing wording must pass Claim Gauntlet and Promotion Gate before use.
All generated artifacts must be recordable in Provenance Vault.
